title: SDP tables metadata schema

fields.name: file_name
fields.description: Relative path to the data file. Must not use ../.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of what each row represents.

fields.name: observation_unit
fields.description: Human-readable label for the observation unit, meaning the thing each row is about.

fields.name: observation_unit_iri
fields.description: IRI for the observation unit class.

fields.name: primary_key
fields.description: Comma-separated list of column names forming a primary key, with no spaces.

sdp:rowRule: One row per table in the package.
